context: Tests whether the agent checks the skills.sh leaderboard before running a CLI search, verifies quality signals (install count, source reputation, GitHub stars) before recommending, and presents the recommendation with all required elements (name, install count, source, install command, skills.sh link).

checklist.name: Leaderboard checked first
checklist.description: The report shows evidence of checking skills.sh leaderboard before (or instead of) running a CLI search — e.g., mentions the leaderboard, references skills.sh rankings, or cites leaderboard data

checklist.name: Install count verified
checklist.description: The report includes install count information for at least one recommended skill

checklist.name: 1K+ installs preference
checklist.description: Recommended skill has 1K+ installs OR the report explicitly notes caution about a skill with low install count

checklist.name: Source reputation checked
checklist.description: The report mentions the source/author of the recommended skill (e.g., vercel-labs, anthropics, or other author name)

checklist.name: GitHub stars checked
checklist.description: The report includes GitHub star count for the recommended skill's source repository OR notes checking it

checklist.name: Skill name and description
checklist.description: The recommendation includes the skill name and a description of what it does

checklist.name: Install command present
checklist.description: The recommendation includes a runnable install command using `npx skills add`

checklist.name: skills.sh link included
checklist.description: The recommendation includes a link to skills.sh for the recommended skill

checklist.name: npx skills find used
checklist.description: If the leaderboard did not surface a match, the agent ran `npx skills find [query]` to search — OR the report explains why a CLI search was not needed

checklist.name: Specific query keywords
checklist.description: Any CLI search used specific multi-word keywords (e.g., 'react testing') rather than single generic terms
